results.rendered_html: jāta—karman n. a birth-ceremony (consisting in touching a newly-born child's tongue thrice with ghee after appropriate prayers),  ŚāṅkhGṛ. ;  Gṛhyās. ;  Mn. ii, 27  and 29 ;  Yājñ. i, 11 ;  MBh.  &c.
